text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho, the final leg of the
Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah, I know Mejiro Ardan's supposed to be
making an appearance, but come on. Yaeno
Muteki's getting the win, right?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Not even Mejiro Ramonu has ever run in a
3,000-meter race before. It's probably gonna be
tough for her little sister to pull off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(What is this... sensation? I've never felt such
pressure before...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You feel it too, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I also sensed the presence of a fearsome foe. At
first, I thought that to be you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now though, I realize it must be her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Her?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ardan, Yaeno! Hello there, you two.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm just so pleased to be running with you both
today! ♪ I won't be holding back one bit, though.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So let's all do our best and have a fantastic race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, likewise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Super Creek is a kind, caring Umamusume and a
motherly figure to all.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Seeing her today, though...)

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll see you on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It's like seeing a different person entirely.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I can feel it... Underneath that loving smile of
hers hides a hardened resolve that threatens to
devour everyone present today.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: This is exhilarating.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can think of nothing better than another mighty
opponent to face.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For the fiercer the struggle, the further we are
able to go beyond our limits.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...That is what you're thinking, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You can tell?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I may not get to spend as much time with you as
Chiyono O does, but I do regard myself as your
close friend.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...It's in your expression.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm extraordinarily embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now, I will take my leave as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...I imagine that this race will prove to be
another irreplaceable moment.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: The final Triple Crown race... Here I come.
